text: Stepping from a sterile, glass-walled conference room into a vibrant exhibition space, I am struck by the contrast between order and creativity. In the first room, the emptiness and angular reflections evoke a sense of waiting—a liminal space, neither here nor there. The second room is an invitation to thought: colors and words surround me, the wall itself urging reflection on clarity and confusion. Immersed in this dialogue of environments, I feel both disoriented and inspired, aware of how context shapes my focus and curiosity.
